measures.name: Turnover
measures.expression:
VAR selected_start = MIN ( 'Dim Date'[Day] )
VAR selected_end   = MAX ( 'Dim Date'[Day] )
VAR departures =
    CALCULATE (
        COUNTROWS ( 'Dim Resource Flow' ),
        KEEPFILTERS ( 'Dim Resource Flow'[flow_type] = "Departure" ),
        FILTER (
            'Dim Resource Flow',
            'Dim Resource Flow'[event_date] >= selected_start
                && 'Dim Resource Flow'[event_date] <= selected_end
        )
    )
RETURN
IF ( departures = 0, 0, departures )

measures.name: Working Days (Interne)
measures.expression:
VAR ResourceSet =
    VALUES ( 'Dim Resources'[resource_id] )
RETURN
SUMX (
    ResourceSet,
    VAR WD =
        CALCULATE ( [Real Working Days] )
    VAR WDClient =
        CALCULATE ( [Working Days (Client)] )
    VAR     WDIntternalProject =
        CALCULATE ( [Working Days (Internal Proj.)] )
    VAR Abs =
        CALCULATE ( [Absences] )
    VAR InterPerResource =
        WD - WDClient - WDIntternalProject - Abs
    RETURN
        MAX ( 0, InterPerResource )
)
